name: Potion of Healing
description: Heals 10 HP

name: Potion of greater healing
description: Heals 20 HP

name: Potion of superior healing
description: Heals 40 HP

name: Potion of supreme healing
description: Heals 60 HP

name: Base Weapon +1
description: +1 to attack and damage rolls Classes that do not have a base weapon can draw again.

name: Base Weapon +2
description: +2 to attack and damage rolls. Classes that do not have a base weapon can draw again.

name: Base Weapon +3
description: +3 to attack and damage rolls. Classes that do not have a base weapon can draw again.

name: Ring of protection +1
description: +1 to AC and saves

name: Ring of protection +2
description: +2 to AC and saves

name: Cloak of protection +1
description: +1 to AC and saves

name: Cloak of protection +2
description: +2 to AC and saves

name: Cloak of Misty Step
description: Once per encounter, you can use this cloak to teleport up to 30 feet in a direction of your choosing.

name: Potion of Heroism
description: Immediately use any ability you possess, without requiring or expending charges. Excludes abilities that would result in your death.

name: Potion of Speed
description: During this encounter, as a reaction, you may move up to 60 feet.

name: Potion of Battle
description: You have advantage on attack rolls until you miss an attack, or the encounter ends.

name: Potion of Power
description: Regain all uses of one ability that is limited by resting.

name: Rod of Magic Missile
description: 1d4+4 force dmg, 3 shots per use. Discard only if you roll two or more 1s when rolling damage.

name: Rod of Scorching Ray
description: 2d6 fire damage, 3 shots per use. Discard only if you roll two 1s when rolling damage.

name: Scroll of Lightning Bolt
description: 8d6 lightning damage in a line, DC 14 DEX save for half damage.

name: Scroll of Disintegration
description: 8d8+6 force damage, DC 17 DEX save for no damage.

name: Ugly Mask
description: Target enemy makes a DC 15 WIS save or is afraid of you. Only discard if target succeeds on their save.

name: Cloak of the Wind
description: You may move 30' or Disengage as a bonus action. Discard if you do not use this ability on your turn.

name: Lucky Charm
description: Discard to reroll a d20 you just rolled. Use the higher of the two results.

name: Warding Charm
description: Discard to take half damage from any attack or trap.

name: Potion of Rage
description: Use when you deal damage: Add 2 more dice of any size the damage includes. This ability ends after the current encounter.

name: Potion of Invulnerability
description: After drinking, once during this encounter, become invulnerable until your next turn as a reaction.

name: Bottle of Duplication
description: You may discard this instead of discarding a Potion.

name: Bag of Holding
description: Draw two more cards!

name: Deck of Many Things
description: Draw from the Deck of Many Things!
